scripts.nx:unlock: nx daemon --stop 2>/dev/null || true && rm -rf .nx/workspace-data .nx/cache && echo 'Nx daemon stopped and cache cleared.'
scripts.build:doubletwelve: cd vendor/DoubleTwelve && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config vite.lib.config.ts && rm -f dist/package.json
scripts.build:all: yarn build:doubletwelve && yarn build:engine && yarn build:react && yarn build:theme && yarn build:bridge
scripts.build:libs: yarn build:doubletwelve && yarn build:engine && yarn build:react && yarn build:theme
scripts.calibrate:ai-tei: AI_CALIBRATION_REPORT=1 vitest run --config libs/engine/vite.config.mts src/lib/ai/ai-elo-calibration.spec.ts -t "prints a calibration"
scripts.calibrate:ai-tei-dti: AI_CALIBRATION_REPORT=1 AI_CALIBRATION_DROP_TO_IMPULSE=1 vitest run --config libs/engine/vite.config.mts src/lib/ai/ai-elo-calibration.spec.ts -t "prints a calibration"
scripts.optimize:ai-weights: AI_WEIGHT_OPTIMIZE=1 AI_OPTIMIZER_PARALLEL=1 vitest run --config libs/engine/vite.config.mts src/lib/ai/ai-weight-optimizer.spec.ts -t "prints optimizer"
scripts.test:all: yarn test:engine && yarn test:react && yarn test:bridge && yarn test:e2e
scripts.pack:libs: yarn build:libs && yarn pack:engine && yarn pack:react && yarn pack:theme
scripts.class1-star:pipeline: yarn class1-star:collect && yarn class1-star:train && yarn class1-star:bench
scripts.class1-star:pipeline:deep: yarn class1-star:collect && yarn class1-star:train:deep && yarn class1-star:bench
scripts.class1-star:pipeline:deepblue: yarn class1-star:collect:rl && yarn class1-star:train:deepblue && CLASS1_STAR_BENCH_GAMES=500 yarn class1-star:bench
scripts.class1-star:pipeline:go-out: CLASS1_STAR_OBJECTIVE=go-out CLASS1_STAR_OUT=tools/nn/data/trajectories-go-out.jsonl yarn class1-star:collect && tools/nn/.venv/bin/python tools/nn/train.py --data tools/nn/data/trajectories-go-out.jsonl --loss combined --weight-scheme outcome --alpha 1.5 && CLASS1_STAR_OBJECTIVE=go-out jiti tools/nn/bench-class1-star.ts
scripts.fleet-admiral:bench:go-out-4p:500: AI_BENCH_PARALLEL=1 FLEET_BENCH_GAMES=500 CLASS1_STAR_OBJECTIVE=go-out CLASS1_STAR_PLAYERS=4 jiti tools/nn/bench-fleet-admiral.ts
scripts.deploy:functions: yarn workspace @warp12/functions build && firebase deploy --only functions --project warp-12 && /usr/bin/env bash scripts/ensure-functions-public-invoker.sh && /usr/bin/env bash scripts/ensure-functions-auth-permissions.sh
scripts.deploy:hosting:bridge: yarn build:all && firebase deploy --only hosting:bridge --project warp-12
scripts.deploy:hosting:leaderboard: yarn build:leaderboard && firebase deploy --only hosting:leaderboard --project warp-12
scripts.deploy:hosting: yarn build:all:hosting && firebase deploy --only hosting --project warp-12
scripts.deploy:firebase: yarn build:all:hosting && yarn workspace @warp12/functions build && firebase deploy --only firestore,functions,hosting --project warp-12 && /usr/bin/env bash scripts/ensure-functions-public-invoker.sh && /usr/bin/env bash scripts/ensure-functions-auth-permissions.sh
